channel.title: var0.xyz
channel.description: Var Zero's blog: a philosophical approach to tech.

item.title: Perfection is not over-engineering
item.description: The industry conflates perfection with over-engineering. They're not the same. Over-engineering is solving the wrong problem; a perfect solution exists once the requirements are clear.

item.title: GraphQL: The leakiest of abstractions
item.description: Every abstraction leaks. GraphQL is the only one I know that leaks in both directions: out to the frontend and back into the backend.
